name: stripe-apps-community-examples
description: Stripe Apps Community meetup examples: a Stripe App UI extension + a Next.js backend (Supabase, Drizzle, Better Auth)

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix stripe-app && npm install --prefix nextjs-backend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix stripe-app && npm install --prefix nextjs-backend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,stripe-app -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:app"
